prompt: Continuing seamlessly from the prior cyan BIM wireframe frame: the glowing digital model dissolves into photoreal raw in-situ concrete construction of the exact same contemporary minimalist villa — identical flat roof line, footprint, column positions, and window bay rhythm as the wireframe. Wide stabilized slow push-in on an active construction site, grey overcast sky, exposed cast-in-place concrete columns and slab edges, rebar caps visible, minimal scaffolding, brutalist tectonic architecture, desaturated monochrome documentary, shallow depth of field, fine film grain, no people, no text.
